# Tool7k Thinking3 Spec1k Contract

## Tool 7k
tool result budgets default to 7000 chars with 160-char previews so bulky tool dumps reclaim earlier

## Thinking 3
TUI thinking previews default to 3 lines for denser chrome during long reasoning

## Spec 1.0k
speculative step buffer defaults to 1000 tokens for earlier pre-turn compaction

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + tool/thinking/strategy vitest
